body:
# Gale remediation epic: assessment findings → fix plan

Source: three-lane code review (dense core, factorizations/solvers, sparse/build/bench)
against PRD.md, 2026-07-08. Tests currently green 49/49 on JVM and JS, but the suite
does not exercise the failure modes found below.

## Phase 0 — API decisions (gate everything; decide before more code)

- D1. Mutation tiers: introduce MutableVec (or read-only views). Today DVec carries
  addInPlace/scaleInPlace and slice/row/col are live aliased views, so
  A.row(0).scaleInPlace(2.0) mutates A silently. Decide Tier-1/Tier-2 boundary per PRD.
- D2. LinearOperator.applyTo(x, into: Vec[A]): Unit → into: MutableVec[A], return
  Either[LinAlgError, Unit] (PRD signature). LinearOperator.scala:6.
- D3. solve returns Either by default; add
  `extension [A](e: Either[LinAlgError, A]) def orThrow: A`
  and make the PRD thesis snippet `A.solve(b).orThrow` compile. Removes 8 hand-rolled
  match blocks in Matrix.scala:196-257.
- D4. Adopt-or-delete: RowIndex/ColIndex (Shape.scala:70-88, unused) and the DMat
  Layout field (write-only decoration; dispatch is on raw strides). If adopted, add
  isContiguousRowMajor/ColMajor predicates as the single dispatch source (PRD.md:1080).

## Phase 1 — Regression tests first (turn findings into red tests)

- T1. Strided/sliced destination vectors through: sparse mulInto/tMulInto, Diagonal/
  Identity/Zero/Permutation applyTo, Preconditioner.solve, solver internals.
- T2. NaN/Inf-filled destination buffer through all three gemv layout paths and gemm
  (beta==0 must not read destination).
- T3. mulInto aliasing: A.mulInto(x, x) and into = live row/col view of A.
- T4. Int-overflow shapes (rows*cols > Int.MaxValue) in DMat.zeros/dense/
  fromArrayRowMajor and Shape.size; JS-critical.
- T5. MatrixMarket: symmetric/pattern/integer/complex/array headers must error, not
  silently misparse; duplicate entries; comment lines; property round-trip.
- T6. COO.t canonical-flag law; canonicalization laws generally.
- T7. Ill-conditioned solve (Hilbert), scale-dependence of rank
  (1e-20 * I must be full rank), empty matrices, zero-length vectors.
- T8. GMRES restart path actually taken; happy-breakdown termination; wrong-length
  initial guess must raise DimensionMismatch.
- T9. Workspace overloads: assert actual buffer reuse (allocation evidence), not routing.
- T10. Real ScalaCheck generators (shape/sparsity/values) replacing fixed 3-vectors and
  %5 hand-rolls; move the matvec property out of MatrixMarketLawSuite.

## Phase 2 — Correctness fixes (against Phase 1 tests)

- C1. Unify beta==0 semantics (assign, never read) in dgemv, dgemvRowMajor, dgemm —
  DoubleKernels.scala:153,185,271.
- C2. Honor destination offset/stride in sparse kernels — Sparse.scala:288,296-298,307,
  573-575,617-620,652-655,703-706 — and in solvers/preconditioners —
  Solvers.scala:42,53,89,99,180,201,302-324.
- C3. COO.t must not propagate hasCanonicalFormat — Sparse.scala:66-67.
- C4. Rank tolerance: drop max(1.0, maxDiag) floor; use max(m,n)*eps*maxDiag —
  Factorizations.scala:474. Hoist rankToleranceFromMatrix out of the back-substitution
  loop — Factorizations.scala:407.
- C5. Overflow-check rows.toLong*cols.toLong — Matrix.scala:276-308, Shape.scala:101.
- C6. MatrixMarket full header validation — MatrixMarket.scala:27-28.
- C7. Initial guess: Option[DVec], DimensionMismatch on wrong length —
  Solvers.scala:117-118,159-160,220-221.
- C8. GMRES: terminate inner loop on happy breakdown; stop swallowing LS failures —
  Solvers.scala:246-248,276-277.
- C9. SGS zero-diagonal guard + construction-time squareness — Solvers.scala:77-99;
  bicgstab/gmres validate b.length like cg does.
- C10. DuplicatePolicy.Error and Sparse.permutation throw LinAlgError, not
  IllegalArgumentException — Sparse.scala:199,764.

## Phase 3 — Honest APIs (no fakes, no theater)

- H1. Workspace: wire buffers into LU/Cholesky/QR for real (compute in workspace
  arrays; add private[gale] fromArrayOwned to skip defensive clones) or delete the
  overloads — Factorizations.scala:88-89,133-134,143-172,174-259.
- H2. BlockJacobi: implement real block inverses or delete — Solvers.scala:70-73;
  fix placebo test SolverApiSuite.scala:36.
- H3. Rename lsqr → cgnr, or implement genuine Golub–Kahan LSQR —
  Solvers.scala:284-296. PRD requires LSQR/LSMR eventually.
- H4. FactorizationDiagnostics: populate (condition estimate, residual norm) or
  shrink; decide LAPACK-style info>0 completed factorization vs Left for singular LU;
  delete unreachable LU.isSingular — Factorizations.scala:34-52.
- H5. conditionEstimate: rename (exact inverse, O(n^3)) or implement Hager/Higham
  1-norm estimator — Factorizations.scala:267-298.

## Phase 4 — Privacy and storage boundaries (before any external user)

- P1. private[gale] on DoubleKernels methods and platform-array alloc/apply/update —
  DoubleKernels.scala:6, both PlatformArrays.scala.
- P2. Move Array[Double] interop (DVec.fromArray/toArray, DMat.fromArrayRowMajor/
  toArrayRowMajor) out of shared public API into platform-specific unsafe helpers —
  Vec.scala:43,161; Matrix.scala:75,307; PRD.md:455-463, acceptance criterion 1414.
- P3. Factorizations compute in platform DoubleArray, not raw Array[Double], and stop
  the double-clone round-trip — Factorizations.scala:88,148,180-182.
- P4. COO/Diagonal store platform arrays, not raw Array[_] — Sparse.scala:23-25,535.

## Phase 5 — Performance doctrine sweep (with JMH evidence)

- K1. DMat.+/- on dadd/dsub kernels, not tabulate closures — Matrix.scala:188-194.
- K2. Hoist validated data/offset/stride in CSR SpMV and CSR×DMat inner loops —
  Sparse.scala:286,325; same in factorization solve loops (bounds-checked apply per
  element) — Factorizations.scala:300-411.
- K3. zipValues: two-pointer sorted-row merge replacing HashMap[(Int,Int),Double] —
  Sparse.scala:353-380; mapValues structure-preserving — :340-351.
- K4. CSC direct column-scatter kernels (mulInto/tMulInto) instead of toCSR per call —
  Sparse.scala:499-506; CSR.t/CSC.t zero-or-one-copy — :261-262,491-494;
  COO construction-only or cached CSR — :69-73.
- K5. Thin QR: store reflectors/tau, apply Qᵀ implicitly in least squares —
  Factorizations.scala:180-185,387-395.
- K6. GMRES: Givens rotations + recurrence residual (drop per-step dense QR + extra
  matvec) — Solvers.scala:250-269; preconditioner support for GMRES and BiCGSTAB.
- K7. Relative convergence mode (‖r‖ ≤ tol·‖b‖) in solver config.
- K8. norm2 scaled accumulation (dnrm2-style) — Vec.scala:104.
- K9. gemm: contiguous fast path + blocked variant (PRD requires blocking) —
  DoubleKernels.scala:235-277.
- K10. JMH: @Param size sweeps, ≥2 forks, longer windows, -prof gc allocation checks,
  CSR SpMV benchmark, solver-scenario benchmark — DenseKernelJmh.scala.

## Phase 6 — Missing v1 surface + build/infra

- M1. Standalone triangular solve API + kernel (PRD dense-v1 requirement; absent).
- M2. Sparse canonicalization surface on matrices (canonicalize/pruneZeros/prune/
  sortedIndices/hasCanonicalFormat), not just builder — PRD.md:417-425.
- M3. Banded format; CSC op parity (+,-,mapValues,zipValues,toDense,diagonal,trace);
  decide sparse-sparse multiply (implement CSR×CSR or defer explicitly in PRD).
- M4. Unify COO-sums vs CSR-first-match duplicate lookup semantics —
  Sparse.scala:38-44,236-240.
- M5. Extract gale-laws as reusable cross-built testkit module (backend conformance
  depends on it) — build.sbt:24-34.
- M6. Wasm linker profile + fullLinkJS tasks; CI matrix (LTS + Scala Next) —
  PRD.md:1234-1243.
- M7. vendor/breeze: exclude from packaging or relocate out of repo.
- M8. Scaladoc for public surface: NaN policy, view-vs-copy semantics, positive-stride
  restriction, Cholesky reads-lower-triangle-only.

## Sequencing rule

Phases 0 and 1 gate 2; 2 gates 3; 4 can run parallel to 3; 5 needs K10 benchmarks in
place first; 6 is parallelizable except M5 (early, others depend on it).

Also: reset mote v0.3 statuses — tracker currently claims v0.3 complete; by PRD
acceptance criteria it isn't (M2, M3, CSC kernels, module split, workspace reality).
